song.title: Precious Name
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Take the name of Jesus with you, Child of sorrow and of woe; It will joy and comfort give you, Take it then where’er you go.
[C] Chorus Precious name! Oh, how sweet! Hope of earth and joy of heav’n; Precious name! Oh, how sweet! Hope of earth and joy of heav’n.
[V2] 2) Take the name of Jesus ever, As a shield from every snare. If temptations round you gather, Breathe that holy name in prayer.
[V3] 3) O, the precious name of Jesus! How it thrills our souls with joy; When His loving arms receive us, And His songs our tongues employ!
[V4] 4) At the name of Jesus bowing, Falling prostrate at His feet, King of Kings in heav’n we’ll crown Him, When our journey is complete
song.author: Lydia Odell Baxter
